EmailTemplate.description: Email to candidates with links toTriage education providers
EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Triage education providers
EmailTemplate.subject: Recommended Triage education providers
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
It is possible to do some self-study with the Triage - ETEK booklet (attached). Then you can book in an online exam here: Nurse CPD Online – Introduction to Triage. This course costs approximately $35.00.
Other options:
FLECC (First Line Emergency Care Course) – NSW Health course
WACHS Triage – WA Health course
CRANA – "Triage Emergency Care" has theory & practical components. 1 day face-to-face workshop. You would need to register your interest via CRANA’s website for any upcoming courses that may become available.
PLEASE NOTE: These courses are suggestions only, it is always best to also do your own research.
Kind regards, {!User.FirstName} Alliance Rural & Remote Health Tel: 07 4998 5550
